incidents.title: NET-LAB-ALPHA Core Router Instability - BGP Drop + High CPU
incidents.symptom_summary: ROUTER-LAB-01 experiencing high CPU (78%), memory pressure, BGP session drops, and interface GE0/2 failure simultaneously. Lab network degraded - 30% packet loss reported by test automation.
incidents.user_reported_description: Our 5G feature regression suite is failing. Multiple test cases timing out. Started around 8:15 AM. Router seems unstable.
incidents.business_impact: 5G regression test suite blocked. Feature validation for Sprint-24 delayed.

incidents.title: NET-LAB-BETA SW-LAB-02 Down - Cannot Reach Lab Nodes
incidents.symptom_summary: SW-LAB-02 is completely unreachable. Connected devices including LB-LAB-02 are also down. Lab network NET-LAB-BETA is isolated.
incidents.user_reported_description: None of our BETA lab devices are reachable. SSH is timing out. The switch in Rack-B Slot-2 shows no lights on the management port.
incidents.business_impact: IPv6 feature testing on NET-LAB-BETA completely blocked.

timeline.event: SW-LAB-02 stopped responding to SNMP polls

incidents.title: 5G UPF Pod Crash Loop - User Plane Down
incidents.symptom_summary: 5G-UPF-01 is in ERROR state. Kubernetes pod for UPF is in CrashLoopBackOff. All GTP tunnels are down. 5G data plane testing is completely blocked.
incidents.user_reported_description: UPF container keeps crashing every 2 minutes. We upgraded the chart version yesterday. 5G end-to-end tests are all failing at the GTP tunnel establishment step.
incidents.business_impact: All 5G end-to-end data plane test cases blocked. Cannot validate new UPF feature.

timeline.event: Helm chart upgrade performed: UPF v23.R1.0 → v23.R1.1
